steps.title: Read the vertex
steps.content: The equation is in vertex form $y=a(x-h)^2+k$. For $y=-4.7(x-8.3)^2+9{,}800$, the vertex is $(8.3,9{,}800)$.

steps.title: Interpret the maximum
steps.content: Because $a=-4.7$ is negative, the parabola opens downward, so the vertex is the maximum. The plane reaches a maximum height of $9{,}800$ meters at $8.3$ seconds. The answer is B.
